---
title: "Contact"
pagetitle: "Contact | Ian Phillips"
body-class: contact-page
---
::: {.contact-card}
**Ian Phillips**  
Bloomberg Distinguished Professor of Philosophy and Brain Sciences  
Johns Hopkins University
:::

## Email

[ianbphillips@jhu.edu](mailto:ianbphillips@jhu.edu)

## Address

William H. Miller III Department of Philosophy  
Johns Hopkins University  
281 Gilman Hall  
3400 N. Charles Street  
Baltimore, MD 21218  
USA


::: {.profile-links}
[![](images/icons/google-scholar.svg){.profile-icon} Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/) [![](images/icons/researchgate.svg){.profile-icon} ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/) [![](images/icons/bluesky.svg){.profile-icon} Bluesky](https://bsky.app/) [CV](cv.qmd)
:::
